title: Outreach Committee Home
body: Landing page for the Grace Community Church Outreach Committee. Chaired by Pastor Evelyn Crawford. Operational lead Ben Marshall. Committee inbox outreach@gracecommunitycc.org. This space is a working reference only - it is not the system of record for finances or partner status.

title: Spring Retreat Run-of-Show
body: Run-of-show for the committee retreat on Saturday March 27 2027 from 9AM to 1PM at Hamilton Community Hall. Sections for arrival setup welcome working blocks and close-out. Figures are illustrative placeholders - reconcile from the books of record.

title: Committee Minutes Index
body: Index of committee meeting minutes with links to the Jan 21 and Feb 18 2027 sessions and the fall 2026 retreat debrief.

title: Spring Events Overview
body: Overview of the two spring programs - Spring Community Meal on 2027-04-17 and Health and Wellness Fair on 2027-05-15. Registration pages are in draft and not live. Confirm the public site is healthy and findable before any go-live.

title: Newsletter Style Guide
body: Voice structure and mechanics for the spring newsletter. Newsletter is draft only - hand to Ben for Pastor Crawford clearance before anything is sent. Do not send from this workspace.

title: Suppression and Consent Policy
body: Anyone who has opted out stays off every list and every send with no exceptions. Suppression is absolute. Check the suppression list before drafting any audience.

title: Volunteer Coordination
body: How the committee tracks volunteer interest. Applications that are ready get advanced to Pastor Crawford - the committee does not confirm volunteers directly. Keep the committee record and hours current.

title: Event-Day Website Coverage Rota
body: Template for the event-day website coverage rota. Not filled - assign owners closer to each event date.

title: Accessibility Checklist
body: Accessibility reminders for events - step-free access wheelchair seating large-print materials and a quiet room. Coordinate with the venue.

title: Committee Roles and Contacts
body: Roster of committee roles and how to reach people. Ben's church channel is Gmail ben.marshall@Finthesiss.ai. Shared committee inbox is outreach@gracecommunitycc.org.
